{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Prestigious Consulting is a professional HR consultancy firm. We focus on improving organizational performance through strategic people &amp; process management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a creative, strategic, and results-driven Social Media Manager to oversee the company&#39;s online presence.
	The ideal candidate will create compelling content, grow engagement across social media platforms, execute digital marketing campaigns, and strengthen the brand&#39;s online visibility.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media strategies aligned with business goals.
	Create, schedule, and publish engaging content across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, and X.
	Produce high-quality graphics, reels, videos, and written content.
	Manage the content calendar and ensure consistent posting.
	Monitor trends, audience engagement, and competitor activities.
	Respond to comments, messages, and customer inquiries promptly.
	Track performance metrics and prepare monthly analytics reports.
	Collaborate with internal teams on marketing campaigns and promotions.
	Manage paid social media campaigns when required.


Requirements


	HND / B.Sc. Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Digital Media, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2&ndash;3 years of experience in social media management.
	Strong knowledge of Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, and X.
	Proficiency in Canva, CapCut, Meta Business Suite, and other content creation tools.
	Excellent copywriting, communication, and organizational skills.
	Basic knowledge of social media analytics and digital advertising.
	Must reside within the Lekki axis.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 Monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs and portfolio to: hr@prestigiousconsultinggroup.ng using &quot;Social Media Manager - Application&quot; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-21",

Social Media Manager Job at Prestigious Consulting




        
    

        
        Prestigious Consulting is a professional HR consultancy firm. We focus on improving organizational performance through strategic people & process management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a creative, strategic, and results-driven Social Media Manager to oversee the company's online presence.
	The ideal candidate will create compelling content, grow engagement across social media platforms, execute digital marketing campaigns, and strengthen the brand's online visibility.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media strategies aligned with business goals.
	Create, schedule, and publish engaging content across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, and X.
	Produce high-quality graphics, reels, videos, and written content.
	Manage the content calendar and ensure consistent posting.
	Monitor trends, audience engagement, and competitor activities.
	Respond to comments, messages, and customer inquiries promptly.
	Track performance metrics and prepare monthly analytics reports.
	Collaborate with internal teams on marketing campaigns and promotions.
	Manage paid social media campaigns when required.


Requirements


	HND / B.Sc. Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Digital Media, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2–3 years of experience in social media management.
	Strong knowledge of Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, and X.
	Proficiency in Canva, CapCut, Meta Business Suite, and other content creation tools.
	Excellent copywriting, communication, and organizational skills.
	Basic knowledge of social media analytics and digital advertising.
	Must reside within the Lekki axis.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 Monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs and portfolio to: [email protected] using "Social Media Manager - Application" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Infytel Communications Limited is a growth-mindset tech company that provides leading-edge technology solutions and services to companies. At the core, our motivation is business growth for enterprise corporations, and in an age of pro-internet technologies, leading-edge technology is the most effective enabler for business growth and customer experience. We seek out, develop, and deploy tailor-made solutions either in-house or through strategic technology partnerships; and serve it to forward-thinking companies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Job type: Full-time
Work Mode: Fully Onsite
Work Days: Monday &ndash; Friday

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Accountant to oversee the company&#39;s financial records, statutory compliance, tax filings, and reporting.
	The ideal candidate will have strong knowledge of Nigerian tax regulations, accounting standards, and regulatory compliance while demonstrating the ability to manage high transaction volumes in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records and prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Prepare and file statutory taxes, including VAT, Withholding Tax (WHT), PAYE, and Companies Income Tax (CIT).
	Liaise with the Federal Inland Revenue Service (FIRS), Lagos Internal Revenue Service (LIRS), and other regulatory bodies on tax and compliance matters.
	Ensure timely filing of annual returns and maintain compliance with Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) requirements.
	Prepare reconciliations for bank accounts, ledgers, and other financial records.
	Support internal and external audit processes by preparing accurate documentation in line with IFRS standards.
	Process financial transactions while maintaining a high level of accuracy and confidentiality.
	Identify process improvement opportunities and support the implementation of accounting best practices.
	Utilize Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets to analyze financial data and prepare reports.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure compliance with company financial policies and regulatory requirements.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.
	3&ndash;6 years of relevant accounting experience.
	Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets.
	Strong working knowledge of Nigerian tax laws, including VAT, Withholding Tax (WHT), PAYE, and Companies Income Tax (CIT).
	Familiarity with FIRS filing procedures and experience liaising with tax authorities.
	Working knowledge of Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) statutory compliance and annual returns.
	Basic understanding of audit processes and IFRS documentation standards.
	Comfortable representing the company before FIRS, LIRS, CAC, and other regulatory agencies when required.
	Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage high transaction volumes.
	Quick learner with the ability to adapt to new accounting systems and technologies.
	Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills with exceptional attention to detail.


Salary
N400,000 - N600,000 / Month",

Accountant Job at Infytel Communications Limited




        
    

        
        Infytel Communications Limited is a growth-mindset tech company that provides leading-edge technology solutions and services to companies. At the core, our motivation is business growth for enterprise corporations, and in an age of pro-internet technologies, leading-edge technology is the most effective enabler for business growth and customer experience. We seek out, develop, and deploy tailor-made solutions either in-house or through strategic technology partnerships; and serve it to forward-thinking companies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Job type: Full-time
Work Mode: Fully Onsite
Work Days: Monday – Friday
     

            
    



Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Accountant to oversee the company's financial records, statutory compliance, tax filings, and reporting.
	The ideal candidate will have strong knowledge of Nigerian tax regulations, accounting standards, and regulatory compliance while demonstrating the ability to manage high transaction volumes in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records and prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Prepare and file statutory taxes, including VAT, Withholding Tax (WHT), PAYE, and Companies Income Tax (CIT).
	Liaise with the Federal Inland Revenue Service (FIRS), Lagos Internal Revenue Service (LIRS), and other regulatory bodies on tax and compliance matters.
	Ensure timely filing of annual returns and maintain compliance with Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) requirements.
	Prepare reconciliations for bank accounts, ledgers, and other financial records.
	Support internal and external audit processes by preparing accurate documentation in line with IFRS standards.
	Process financial transactions while maintaining a high level of accuracy and confidentiality.
	Identify process improvement opportunities and support the implementation of accounting best practices.
	Utilize Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets to analyze financial data and prepare reports.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure compliance with company financial policies and regulatory requirements.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.
	3–6 years of relevant accounting experience.
	Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets.
	Strong working knowledge of Nigerian tax laws, including VAT, Withholding Tax (WHT), PAYE, and Companies Income Tax (CIT).
	Familiarity with FIRS filing procedures and experience liaising with tax authorities.
	Working knowledge of Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) statutory compliance and annual returns.
	Basic understanding of audit processes and IFRS documentation standards.
	Comfortable representing the company before FIRS, LIRS, CAC, and other regulatory agencies when required.
	Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage high transaction volumes.
	Quick learner with the ability to adapt to new accounting systems and technologies.
	Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills with exceptional attention to detail.


Salary
N400,000 - N600,000 / Month    

    

        Click here to Apply

Brand and Marketing Manager Job at MarbleClear Limited




        
    

        
        MarbleClear - Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Brand and Marketing Manager
Job Location: Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking to hire a strategic and creative Brand & Marketing Manager to drive brand growth, execute integrated marketing initiatives, and strengthen audience engagement.
	The role involves managing campaigns, partnerships, sponsorships, and stakeholder relationships to enhance brand visibility and support business objectives across all platforms.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Develop and implement brand and marketing strategies aligned with business objectives.
	Conduct market research to understand audience behavior, market trends, and competitive activities.
	Plan and execute integrated marketing campaigns across digital, print, OOH, and broadcast channels.
	Coordinate internal marketing teams, including content, design, and social media functions.
	Monitor campaign performance and optimize strategies to improve engagement and ROI.
	Identify, secure, and manage sponsorship opportunities and strategic partnerships.
	Build and maintain relationships with corporate organizations, stakeholders, and relevant institutions.
	Research and manage grant opportunities, ensuring compliance with reporting requirements.
	Track marketing KPIs and prepare performance reports for management review.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Public Relations, or a related field.
	5–7 years of experience in brand management, marketing, communications, or related roles.
	Experience in supervising teams.
	Strong understanding of integrated marketing, brand strategy, and corporate communications.
	Experience managing partnerships, sponsorships, corporate engagements, and events.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong stakeholder management and team coordination skills.
	Ability to analyze campaign performance and optimize strategies for improved engagement and ROI.


Method of Application 
Interested and qulified candidates should please send their Cvs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Tax Accountant",
  "description": "MarbleClear Limited, a human Resource Consulting firm, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Tax Accountant

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Tax Accountant to join our Finance team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring statutory tax compliance, managing tax filings, supporting audits, and liaising with regulatory authorities while ensuring adherence to applicable tax laws and financial reporting standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Ensure monthly compliance with VAT, WHT, PAYE, Pension, NSITF, Union, and Cooperative deductions.
	Prepare monthly tax provisions, including minimum tax and additional PAYE.
	Review tax computations, prepare payment schedules and payment instructions, and file statutory returns through relevant regulatory portals.
	Obtain and maintain evidence of tax payments and provide pension deduction schedules to Pension Fund Administrators (PFAs).
	Manage tax and statutory audits involving FIRS, State Internal Revenue Services, NSITF, ITF, NEPC, and other regulatory bodies.
	Respond promptly to official tax notices, queries, and requests for information.
	Liaise with tax consultants and government agencies on tax-related matters, including transfer pricing, export incentives, grants, and tax clearance processes.
	Facilitate the processing of employees&#39; annual Tax Clearance Certificates (TCCs).
	Negotiate professional fees with external consultants where required.
	Ensure timely closure of outstanding tax audits and settlement of any additional tax liabilities.
	Support other finance and tax-related responsibilities as assigned.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.
	3&ndash;5 years of relevant tax accounting experience, preferably within the FMCG or manufacturing industry.
	Membership of a recognized professional accounting body (ICAN, ACCA, ANAN, or equivalent) is required.
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian tax laws, including VAT, WHT, PAYE, Company Income Tax (CIT), Pension, and NSITF regulations.
	Good understanding of IFRS, Local GAAP, and general accounting principles.
	Proficiency in SAP ERP and Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel.
	Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
	Ability to manage multiple deadlines and maintain a high level of accuracy


Salary
N400,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should please send their CVs to: career.precendia@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Tax Accountant Job at MarbleClear Limited




        
    

        
        MarbleClear Limited, a human Resource Consulting firm, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Tax Accountant

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Tax Accountant to join our Finance team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring statutory tax compliance, managing tax filings, supporting audits, and liaising with regulatory authorities while ensuring adherence to applicable tax laws and financial reporting standards.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Ensure monthly compliance with VAT, WHT, PAYE, Pension, NSITF, Union, and Cooperative deductions.
	Prepare monthly tax provisions, including minimum tax and additional PAYE.
	Review tax computations, prepare payment schedules and payment instructions, and file statutory returns through relevant regulatory portals.
	Obtain and maintain evidence of tax payments and provide pension deduction schedules to Pension Fund Administrators (PFAs).
	Manage tax and statutory audits involving FIRS, State Internal Revenue Services, NSITF, ITF, NEPC, and other regulatory bodies.
	Respond promptly to official tax notices, queries, and requests for information.
	Liaise with tax consultants and government agencies on tax-related matters, including transfer pricing, export incentives, grants, and tax clearance processes.
	Facilitate the processing of employees' annual Tax Clearance Certificates (TCCs).
	Negotiate professional fees with external consultants where required.
	Ensure timely closure of outstanding tax audits and settlement of any additional tax liabilities.
	Support other finance and tax-related responsibilities as assigned.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.
	3–5 years of relevant tax accounting experience, preferably within the FMCG or manufacturing industry.
	Membership of a recognized professional accounting body (ICAN, ACCA, ANAN, or equivalent) is required.
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian tax laws, including VAT, WHT, PAYE, Company Income Tax (CIT), Pension, and NSITF regulations.
	Good understanding of IFRS, Local GAAP, and general accounting principles.
	Proficiency in SAP ERP and Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel.
	Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
	Ability to manage multiple deadlines and maintain a high level of accuracy


Salary
N400,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should please send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Seafood Restaurant Manager",
  "description": "Prixair Group is a dynamic and diversified company committed to excellence across various industries including hospitality, beauty, events, logistics, media, and lifestyle services. With a passion for delivering world-class experiences, Prixair has built a strong reputation for quality, professionalism, and innovation.

Driven by a customer-first philosophy, Prixair Group continuously sets industry benchmarks through exceptional service delivery, operational efficiency, and a dedicated workforce. Our diverse portfolio of brands works seamlessly together to provide top-tier solutions that meet the evolving needs of individuals and organizations. From premium spa treatments to event planning, media production, transport, and hotel management, Prixair Group is dedicated to creating value and inspiring trust across every touchpoint.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Seafood Restaurant Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary


	Are you an experienced hospitality professional with a passion for delivering outstanding customer experiences?
	We are looking for a motivated and hands-on Seaside Restaurant Manager to lead our busy seaside restaurant.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage the daily operation of the restaurant.
	Create staff schedules and manage labour costs.
	Deliver exceptional customer service and resolve guest concerns professionally.
	Monitor stock levels, place orders, and manage inventory.
	Ensure compliance with food safety, hygiene, and health and safety regulations.
	Work closely with the kitchen team to maintain high service standards.

Seafood Restaurant Manager Job at Prixair Group




        
    

        
        Prixair Group is a dynamic and diversified company committed to excellence across various industries including hospitality, beauty, events, logistics, media, and lifestyle services. With a passion for delivering world-class experiences, Prixair has built a strong reputation for quality, professionalism, and innovation.
     

            
    



Driven by a customer-first philosophy, Prixair Group continuously sets industry benchmarks through exceptional service delivery, operational efficiency, and a dedicated workforce. Our diverse portfolio of brands works seamlessly together to provide top-tier solutions that meet the evolving needs of individuals and organizations. From premium spa treatments to event planning, media production, transport, and hotel management, Prixair Group is dedicated to creating value and inspiring trust across every touchpoint.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Seafood Restaurant Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary


	Are you an experienced hospitality professional with a passion for delivering outstanding customer experiences?
	We are looking for a motivated and hands-on Seaside Restaurant Manager to lead our busy seaside restaurant.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage the daily operation of the restaurant.
	Create staff schedules and manage labour costs.
	Deliver exceptional customer service and resolve guest concerns professionally.
	Monitor stock levels, place orders, and manage inventory.
	Ensure compliance with food safety, hygiene, and health and safety regulations.
	Work closely with the kitchen team to maintain high service standards.
	Monitor financial performance, including budgets, sales, and profitability.
	Develop ideas and promotions to increase customer numbers and revenue.


What We're Looking For


	Previous experience managing a seaside restaurant.
	Strong leadership and team management skills.
	Excellent communication and organisational abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment.
	Sound knowledge of food safety and health regulations.
	Experience with budgeting, stock control, and cost management.
	A positive attitude with a passion for hospitality.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
